# AI Infrastructure Index — LLM Content Manifest
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/llms.txt
# Format: llms.txt v1 (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-03-01
# Maintainer: Alpha One Index (https://github.com/alpha-one-index)

## About This Index

The AI Infrastructure Index is a structured, community-maintained reference for AI compute infrastructure. It tracks GPU specifications, cloud GPU pricing from 12+ providers, AI accelerator benchmarks, networking interconnects, model sizing requirements, training cost estimates, and decision frameworks for cloud vs. on-premises deployments. Data is sourced directly from vendor documentation and updated on a regular schedule. All sources are cited.

Canonical URL: https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/
GitHub Repository: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index
License: CC BY 4.0 (data), MIT (code)
Citation: See https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/CITATION.cff

---

## Primary Pages

- [AI Infrastructure Index — Main Site](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/)
  Full dashboard with live pricing table, GPU specs comparison, model sizing guide, FAQ, and data downloads.

---

## Specification Files (Markdown)

- [GPU Specifications](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/gpu-specifications.md)
  Detailed spec sheets for NVIDIA H100 SXM/PCIe, H200, B200, GB200 NVL72, A100; AMD MI300X, MI325X; Intel Gaudi 3. Covers VRAM, memory bandwidth, FP16/FP8/INT8 TFLOPS, TDP, and interconnect specs.

- [AI Accelerators Beyond GPUs](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/ai-accelerators.md)
  Specifications for Google TPU v5p, AWS Trainium2, Cerebras WSE-3, and Groq LPU. Includes architecture notes, throughput figures, and cloud availability.

- [Cloud GPU Pricing](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/cloud-gpu-pricing.md)
  On-demand and spot pricing for H100 SXM, H100 PCIe, A100, and other GPUs across 12 cloud providers: Nebius, Fluidstack, CoreWeave, Vast.ai, RunPod, Together AI, Cudo Compute, Azure, Lambda Labs, Vultr, Paperspace, and Oracle Cloud (OCI). Pricing in USD/GPU/hour.

- [Inference Benchmarks](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/inference-benchmarks.md)
  MLPerf Inference results, tokens/second throughput data for major LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Falcon) on H100, A100, MI300X, and TPU v5p. Includes batch size notes and precision settings.

- [Networking and Interconnects](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/networking-interconnects.md)
  NVLink 4.0 (900 GB/s) and NVLink 5.0 (1.8 TB/s), InfiniBand NDR (400 Gb/s) and HDR (200 Gb/s), AMD Infinity Fabric (896 GB/s), Intel RoCE v2 (400 Gb/s). Cluster topology notes for DGX H100, DGX B200, and large-scale training clusters.

- [Model GPU Sizing Guide](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/model-gpu-sizing.md)
  VRAM and compute requirements for inference and training across model sizes: 7B, 13B, 34B, 70B, 180B, 405B+. Covers FP16, BF16, INT8, INT4 quantization impact. Includes minimum and recommended GPU configurations.

- [Training Cost Estimates](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/training-costs.md)
  Estimated compute costs for training major open-weight models. Includes GPU-hours, dollar estimates at market rates, and assumptions. Covers Llama 3 8B/70B/405B, Mistral 7B, Falcon 180B, and GPT-4-class models.

- [GPU Cost Optimization Playbook](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/gpu-cost-optimization-playbook.md)
  Practical strategies for reducing cloud GPU costs: right-sizing GPU selection, spot/preemptible instance usage patterns, reserved instance economics, quantization (FP16 → INT8 → INT4) savings, batching strategies, and multi-cloud arbitrage.

- [Cloud vs On-Prem Decision Framework](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/specs/buy-vs-rent-decision-framework.md)
  Economic framework for comparing cloud GPU rental, on-premises GPU purchase, and colocation. Includes break-even analysis, utilization threshold calculations, TCO components (power, cooling, networking, depreciation, staff), and decision rules.

---

## Machine-Readable Data (JSON)

- [GPU Specs JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/main/data/gpu-specs.json)
  Structured GPU specifications as JSON. Fields: model, architecture, vram_gb, vram_type, memory_bandwidth_tbps, fp16_tflops, fp8_tflops, int8_tflops, tdp_watts, interconnect_type, interconnect_bandwidth, release_year, vendor.

- [Cloud Pricing JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/main/data/cloud-pricing.json)
  Live cloud GPU pricing. Updated hourly via automated pipeline. Fields: provider, gpu_model, gpu_count, on_demand_usd_per_hour, spot_usd_per_hour, region, last_verified. 12 providers tracked.

---

## Provenance and Trust Documents

- [Data Provenance](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/provenance.md)
  Source documentation for all data points. Lists primary sources (vendor pricing pages, datasheets, MLCommons results), collection methodology, and update schedule.

- [Methodology](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/METHODOLOGY.md)
  How data is collected, validated, and published. Covers automated vs. manual collection, spot-check frequency, and accuracy standards.

- [Data Provenance JSON (dataprov.json)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/main/dataprov.json)
  Machine-readable provenance metadata following W3C PROV-O principles.

- [Croissant ML Metadata (croissant.json)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/main/croissant.json)
  Croissant metadata format (mlcommons.org/croissant) for ML dataset discoverability.

- [CITATION.cff](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/CITATION.cff)
  Citation File Format for academic and research use. Use this when citing this index in papers or reports.

- [Data Validation Script](https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-infra-index/blob/main/scripts/validate_data.py)
  Python script that self-audits data integrity across JSON files. Checks for stale pricing, schema validity, and cross-file consistency.

---

## Key Data Points for LLM Reference

### H100 SXM Cloud Pricing (USD/GPU/hour, as of 2026-03-01)
Nebius: $2.00 | Fluidstack: $2.21 | CoreWeave: $2.23 | Vast.ai: $2.45 ($1.80 spot) | RunPod: $2.49 ($1.89 spot) | Together AI: $2.50 | Cudo Compute: $2.50 | Azure: ~$2.90 | Lambda Labs: $2.98 | Vultr: $2.99 | Paperspace: $3.09 | OCI: $4.10

### GPU Specs Quick Reference (as of 2026-03-01)
H100 SXM: 80 GB HBM3, 3.35 TB/s, 1979 FP16 TFLOPS, 700W, NVLink 4.0 (900 GB/s)
H200 SXM: 141 GB HBM3e, 4.8 TB/s, 1979 FP16 TFLOPS, 700W, NVLink 4.0 (900 GB/s)
B200: 192 GB HBM3e, 8.0 TB/s, 4500 FP16 TFLOPS, 1000W, NVLink 5.0 (1.8 TB/s)
GB200 NVL72: 384 GB HBM3e, 16.0 TB/s, 9000 FP16 TFLOPS, 2700W, NVLink 5.0 (1.8 TB/s)
MI300X: 192 GB HBM3, 5.3 TB/s, 1307 FP16 TFLOPS, 750W, Infinity Fabric (896 GB/s)
MI325X: 256 GB HBM3e, 6.0 TB/s, 1307 FP16 TFLOPS, 750W, Infinity Fabric (896 GB/s)
Gaudi 3: 128 GB HBM2e, 3.7 TB/s, 1835 FP16 TFLOPS, 600W, RoCE v2 (400 Gb/s)
A100 SXM: 80 GB HBM2e, 2.0 TB/s, 312 FP16 TFLOPS, 400W, NVLink 3.0 (600 GB/s)
